slides.title: Your gut runs your *energy and skin*.
slides.sub: The microbes down there shape how you feel, look, and fight off bugs. And they want something other than another fiber pill.

slides.title: Feed the variety
slides.body: Your microbes thrive on diversity. Aim for *30 different plants a week* — not just more of the same fiber.

slides.title: Eat something fermented
slides.body: Yogurt, kefir, kimchi, and sauerkraut add *live cultures*. A little every day can support a richer gut community.

slides.title: Chew your food
slides.body: Digestion starts in the mouth. *Chewing slowly* breaks food down further and may help cut the bloating you blame on meals.

slides.title: Stop constant snacking
slides.body: Grazing all day never rests your gut. *Spacing your meals* lets the cleanup wave sweep things through between them.

slides.title: Walk after eating
slides.body: *Water and a short walk* after meals keep digestion moving and can ease that heavy post-meal slump.

slides.title: Feed your gut, *feel the difference*.
slides.body: Log your meals and water in Vibe Health to see your plant variety and fiber add up across the week, not just one good day.

caption:
Your gut runs your energy, your skin, and your immune system — and it wants variety, not another fiber pill. 🥬

Aim for 30 plants a week, add a little fermented daily, chew slowly, leave gaps between meals, walk after eating. Save this. 🔖

Log meals and water in Vibe Health to watch your plant variety add up → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Fix Your Gut for Energy and Clear Skin
